pkgmetadata.longdescription: rfc3986-validatorA pure python RFC3986 validator[[image](httpsimg.shields.iopypivrfc3986_validator.svg)](httpspypi.python.orgpypirfc3986_validator)[[Build Status](httpstravis-ci.orgnaimettirfc3986-validator.svgbranchmaster)](httpstravis-ci.orgnaimettirfc3986-validator) Installshell scriptpip install rfc3986-validator Usagepycon from rfc3986_validator import validate_rfc3986 validate_rfc3986(httpfoo.barqSpaces should be encoded)False validate_rfc3986(httpfoo.comblah_blah_(wikipedia))TrueIt also support validate [URI-reference](httpstools.ietf.orghtmlrfc3986page-49) rule pycon validate_rfc3986(foo.comblah_blah, ruleURI_reference)True - Free software MIT license
